_comment: LAYER 7 (technical SEO): the structured-data values for this specific property. The SHAPE of the schema is standardized in src/_includes/partials/schema.njk and is reused for every hospitality client. Only these VALUES change per client.
description: Premium serviced apartments designed for people who live in Saigon, not just pass through. Flexible stays from 1 night to 6 months in Thao Dien, District 2.
orgDescription: Premium serviced apartments in Thao Dien, District 2, Ho Chi Minh City. Educational portfolio project.
petsAllowed: Small pets allowed in M and L apartments with prior notice
